PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: routed review run and sweep onto native run-Event dispatch

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: added cross-kind not-found hints and stamped the Claude session id into audits

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: hard-cut the overlay to an event-driven provider API

captain-hook@v9.23.0.summary: review run and sweep now ride native run-Event dispatch
